subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the wine of divine love! Blessed art thou, for thou hast been effaced in the peerless Beauty and art submerged in the ocean of hopes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مجذوب باده عشق خوشا بحال تو که محو جمال بیمثال شدی و در بحر آمال مستغرق
subcodes.subjects: @effort; striving, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation, @love of God
